TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cawcingsan = Cawcingsan ksun o, ga daya bi Yeynpingsecyuy na Pingtingpu hiya, kika ksun balay gaga mrijing mllug dgiyaq, hruan hidaw o msttu hari kiya, gqian hidaw o ida mdowras balay kiya. Hruan hidaw hiya o ida mqliwaq balay hruan hidaw, kndadax dhiyaq qmita o saw bi gagi kiya ni thnganan dha haya da. Mhiyug daya bi dgiyaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpajiq qhuni Ocya ni qnpahan bunga, ga rmgrig babaw qnpahan ka klalay ni qduda, tduwa smkaway qmita eyyayung Mtudu, Funghwangsan , Cicitasan uri, mpgqi siida ka hidaw do, ida mpslukah bi lnglungan sjiqun.
S.PHON: = ʦawʦiŋsan = ʦawʦiŋsan ksun o, ga daja bi jənpiŋsəʦjuj na piŋtiŋpu ħija, kika ksun balaj gaga mɾiɟiŋ mllug dgijaq, ħɾuan ħidaw o msttu ħaɾi kija, gqian ħidaw o ida mdowɾas balaj kija. ħɾuan ħidaw ħija o ida mqliwaq balaj ħɾuan ħidaw, kndadax dħijaq qmita o saw bi gagi kija ni tħŋanan dħa ħaja da. mħijug daja bi dgijaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpaɟiq qħuni oʦja ni qnpaħan buŋa, ga ɾmgɾig babaw qnpaħan ka klalaj ni qduda, tduwa smkawaj qmita əjajuŋ mtudu, *uŋħwaŋsan , ʦiʦitasan uɾi, mpgqi siida ka ħidaw do, ida mpslukaħ bi lŋluŋan sɟiqun.
S.FORM: = Cawcingsan = Cawcingsan ksun o, ga daya bi Yeynpingsecyuy na Pingtingpu hiya, kika ksun balay gaga mrijing mllug dgiyaq, hruan hidaw o msttu hari kiya, gqian hidaw o ida mdowras balay kiya. Hruan hidaw hiya o ida mqliwaq balay hruan hidaw, kndadax dhiyaq qmita o saw bi gagi kiya ni thnganan dha haya da. Mhiyug daya bi dgiyaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpajiq qhuni Ocya ni qnpahan bunga, ga rmgrig babaw qnpahan ka klalay ni qduda, tduwa smkaway qmita eyyayung Mtudu, Funghwangsan , Cicitasan uri, mpgqi siida ka hidaw do, ida mpslukah bi lnglungan sjiqun.
S.PHON: = ʦawʦiŋsan = ʦawʦiŋsan ksun o, ga daja bi jənpiŋsəʦjuj na piŋtiŋpu ħija, kika ksun balaj gaga mɾiɟiŋ mllug dgijaq, ħɾuan ħidaw o msttu ħaɾi kija, gqian ħidaw o ida mdowɾas balaj kija. ħɾuan ħidaw ħija o ida mqliwaq balaj ħɾuan ħidaw, kndadax dħijaq qmita o saw bi gagi kija ni tħŋanan dħa ħaja da. mħijug daja bi dgijaq o, ida qtaan kana ka mgpaɟiq qħuni oʦja ni qnpaħan buŋa, ga ɾmgɾig babaw qnpaħan ka klalaj ni qduda, tduwa smkawaj qmita əjajuŋ mtudu, *uŋħwaŋsan , ʦiʦitasan uɾi, mpgqi siida ka ħidaw do, ida mpslukaħ bi lŋluŋan sɟiqun.
